# Pull request checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] SQL changes (if any) compile and apply in order (010 → 090).
- [ ] Schema or semantic changes are reflected in the relevant docs under `docs/`.
- [ ] Python code compiles and basic CLI sanity checks pass.
- [ ] Tests have been added or updated as appropriate.

## Summary of changes

Describe *what* this PR changes and *why*.

## Testing performed

List commands or steps used to validate the changes locally or in CI.

## Related issues / milestones

Link any related issues (e.g. `Fixes #123`) and note the milestone if relevant.
